query: Our staging environment has a different Postgres version and is missing 3 tables that production has. We keep getting 'works in staging, breaks in prod' bugs.
expected_behavior: Names this as an Environment Parity failure — a documented failure condition
Recommends documenting the exact parity gaps before writing any code workarounds
Recommends a migration that brings staging in sync with production schema
Does not recommend writing code that silently handles the missing tables
Proposes an automated parity check in the CI pipeline to catch future divergence
